name: Southeast Asian Cabbage Salad with Cucumber Peanuts & Cil
recipeIngredient: 1 Head white cabbage, cored and thinly sliced
1/2 English cucumber, cut into bite-sized pieces
3 tbsp Soy sauce or fish sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss cabbage with garlic, cucumber, carrot, vinegar, sugar or honey, soy sauce or fish sauce, chiles, and vegetable oil.
2. Chill until ready to serve.
3. Top with peanuts and cilantro.
Serves 4 to 6.
PER SERVING: 205 calories, 6 g protein, 11 g carbohydrate, 17 g fat (2 g saturated), 0 mg cholesterol, 535 mg sodium, 4 g fiber.
